TextENGNew: ...Really, it was just a coincidence.

After finishing a meeting at prefectural police HQ and feeling drowsy from staying up all night, she was looking to get a quick change of pace by stopping at a nearby park before heading back to her apartment.
There, Tomoe suddenly spotted a girl dressed in a school uniform collapsed on the walking trail, and she rushed over to her.
And once she realized the girl was Natsumi, her face turned pale and she sat her up.
"N-Natsumi-san?!@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1523. What happened?! Are you all right?!"
"N...aaa!"
Huge beads of sweat were all over her face, and her bangs were sticking to her forehead.
Her uniform was muddy, and there were countless scrapes and abrasions on her knees and elbows, like she had stumbled multiple times.
"Natsumi-san!@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1525. Hang in there, Natsumi-san!!"
Even though Tomoe called out to her many times and vigorously shook her body, Natsumi's eyes were hollow and unfocused.
...But it seemed like she muttered something in that faint moan.
"What is it?@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1527. Natsumi-san, what are you trying to say?!"
"Hey, do you know who I am?@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1529. Can you hear me?!@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1530. If the answer is yes, squeeze my hand!"
Natsumi was still gasping in pain, but she managed to faintly hold Tomoe's hand.
After feeling that, Tomoe moved her ear right next to the girl's mouth, trying to hear what she was saying.
...Come on, don't overwork yourself.
Aren't you in pain? Don't you feel awful?
Then hurry up and go to sleep.
Just like always... Here. If you take those pills, you'll feel better, you know...?
"Natsumi-san!@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1532. What happened? Say it again!"
"Huh?"
"Medi...cine..."
"Medicine?@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1535. You mean this...?"
When she heard that, she recalled the medicine capsules Natsumi was taking when they met at Angel Mort the other day.
(I'm sure she said it was her regular medication...)
Thinking that, Tomoe searched inside Natsumi's bag and in the pockets of her skirt to locate it. ...But she couldn't find it.
And, while wondering where on earth it could be, she gazed at the base of the nearby bench and suddenly noticed a familiar-looking pill case on the ground beside it.
"Is that it...?!"
Tomoe quickly carried Natsumi to the bench and laid her down, then picked the case up.

She bought a can of oolong tea from the nearby vending machine and emptied the entire contents into a flowerbed, then filled the can with water from a nearby drinking fountain and rushed to bring it back to Natsumi.
"Hang in there!@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1539. This is the medicine, right?"
Natsumi stretched her trembling hand out toward the pill case while breathing harshly.
Taking that as confirmation, Tomoe nodded back to her and then tore two pills out of the packaging.
"Should you take two?@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1541. Or only one?"
Natsumi could vaguely make out the palm of her hand in front of her.
And there... were two small, familiar looking objects... brightly shining at her.
(Ah, the medicine...!)
The medicine she had been searching for, for so so long.
If she takes it... this awful pain and suffering can be so much easier on her.
Her worries, irritation, anger, and hatred... all of it will disappear.
She just needed to clear these burning hot thoughts and feelings out of her head, and fall asleep...
And...
And then...
...Yes, that's right.
If you take that capsule now of all times, "you" will turn into me. ...Completely.
So, take it easy and drift off to sleep.
And after that, "I" will handle things in your stead.
I'll shape all your desires and eliminate all obstacles in your way.
I'll destroy every single thing you don't like...!
"Wha?!"
That moment, Natsumi suddenly opened her eyes and forcefully shook off Tomoe's outstretched hand.
And with that, the capsules in her palm went flying and fell to the ground.
"Wh-what the...?!"
"If... I... ake... hat... I'll... ppear..."
"Natsumi-san...?@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1546. I can't quite hear you. Say it again more slowly!"
"Dis...appear...!@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1544. I'll... disappear...!!"
(...Disappear?@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1549. She... herself?@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1550. What does that mean?)
For a moment, Tomoe was completely shocked by Natsumi's cryptic and unusual choice of words.
But she quickly came back to her senses and realized the situation was dangerous, so she turned toward a nearby payphone.
"Hold on a minute!@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1552. I'll call you an ambulance right way."
"It's all right, it'll only be a little longer.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1554. Close your eyes, it'll make you feel better... okay?"
Tomoe gently squeezed Natsumi's hand as she said that, then turned and ran toward the phone booth.
...Her back got smaller and smaller as she moved farther away.
Though it was rapidly getting cooler... the warmth still lingered on the palm of her hand.
Don't go, Tomoe-san.
I'm... at my limit. I can't take any more...
The back of my throat was constantly dry, sore, irritating, painful, and itchy... It felt absolutely awful.
For a while now, all the blood in my body felt like it was bubbling, like a whole bunch of white insects were running wild inside.
...That's not it.
No... they're not bugs.
Grandma told me about this... they're Oyashiro-sama's "demon" larva.
And they're eating my blood, my flesh and bones, trying to break through the skin and come out.
...Right. I have to get rid of them.
I have to kill them, or they'll kill me!
I have to kill them, I have to kill theeeeem!!!
"Medi...cine... the... demon...!@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1549. The demon... the demon... the deeeemon!!!"
...So itchy.
The inside of my throat is itchy, itchy, itchy itchy itchy itchy itchyyyyy!!
And no matter how hard I scratch it, no matter how much blood oozes out, the itching won't stop, won't stop, wont stoooop!!
I have to kill the demon inside me, right away!
Or I'll be devoured! I'll be killed!!!
Just a few steps before reaching the phone booth, Tomoe suddenly looked back when she heard a strange voice, and was frightened by the sight.
Natsumi was writhing on the ground while crying out in a deranged voice.
She holding her throat in both hands like in a fit of convulsions, and she looked like she was in agony, as if...
That moment.
A sense of deja-vu awakened an image in the back of Tomoe's mind.
(That gesture... She's not holding her throat!)
Both her hands were moving up and down, over and over and over again, stabbing her nails into her neck as they trembled.
No doubt about it... she was scratching at her throat!!
"S-stop it, Natsumi-san!!"
Tomoe turned and ran toward Natsumi in a panic.
Then, her nails pierced the skin of her throat, revealing dark red flesh beneath and staining her neck in bright red blood all the way down to her uniform.
"Oh no... Natsumi-san, what are you doing?!@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1560. Put your hands down... Rgh!!"
"Ga, aaaa... aaaaaaaahh!!!"
"...!!@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1562. Gh... D-damn it...!!"
Tomoe did her best to grab Natsumi's hands and keep her from scratching at her throat.
In exchange, Natsumi's nails gouged the skin on the back of her hands hard enough to spout blood, and severe pain ran through her like she was being torn apart.
"St-stop this...!@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1564. Please... put your hands down...!!"
"Uugh... Aaaaaaaaaahh!!!"
...Why?
Why are you getting in the way, Tomoe-san?
It's so itchy.
It's so, so painful. It's awful.
I have to kill it quickly.
If I don't kill the demon inside me, it'll kill me!!
Are you going to abandon me to death, Tomoe-san...?!
...Or maybe, Tomoe-san,
Do you think... it would be better for me to die?
You think it would be best to let the demon kill me?
And that's why you're getting in my way?
Even now, you're reaching for my throat, trying to strangle me to death?
In that case, I've decided.
You are my enemy.
Enemy. Enemy.
ENEMY ENEMY ENEMY ENEMY ENEMY ENEMY ENEMY ENEMY ENEMY!!!
"Get out of my waaaay!!!"
Natsumi suddenly leapt at Tomoe, and the two collapsed to the ground entangled.
Then, she straddled Tomoe from above like riding a horse and without giving her any time to react, she grabbed Tomoe's neck with both her hands and squeezed with enough force to dig her nails in.
"Gr... gh... N-Natsumi-san...?!"
"I'll kill anyone trying to kill me...!@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1556. Kill, kill... KILL KILL KILL KILL KILL KILL KIIIILL!!!"
Her long hair became disheveled, and her eyes opened wide with a wicked light within as Natsumi focused even harder on strangling Tomoe with her own hands.
Tomoe desperately tried to pull them away, but they were in so tight they were practically biting her so she couldn't create an opening.
Mottled dark spots began blotting her field of view, likely due to the blood congestion.
Tomoe continued resisting and reached a hand into the inside pocket of her jacket, then pulled out the extendable baton she was carrying.
And then, while using her other hand to push up against the pit of Natsumi's stomach with as much strength as she could muster...!
"...Daahh!!"
Natsumi's breathing stopped and her grip loosened at that moment. Tomoe seized the opportunity and jabbed her elbow into Natsumi's side to knock her body away.
And the moment she escaped from her confinement, Tomoe rushed to secure Natsumi who had fallen to the ground... but her legs were weak from the lack of oxygen so she fell to her knees.
"Haah, haah, haah... Gh, gah, egh...!"
Meanwhile... Natsumi slowly and unsteadily rose back up, with an eerie smile on her now soiled face.
...Tomoe couldn't hold back the chill running through her heart as she looked up at that.
...Zashiki-warashi.
She remembered the awful nickname Natsumi had been given in her old town.
Indeed, in her current state she looked just like a ghost.
At the very least, this wasn't the kind-hearted, docile girl she knew... No, she didn't even look human anymore.
Tomoe reflexively shook the baton in her hand, extending it to the length of a short sword.
...No matter how rusty she may be at the moment, she had reached stage three in kendo. Even in this condition, she wasn't about to lose to a young girl.
Plus, even if Natsumi turned and tried to flee, the baton had enough reach to stop her in a moment.
But... could she really do that?
This was a girl she deeply cared about, who regarded her as a sister.
Beating her down like a common thug... was just too...
...I see.
Come to think of it... this lady is a detective. And an exceptionally talented one at that.
Since she's a detective, she may have already noticed this medicine.
No... I'm sure she noticed. And this lady... might even be able to see through my true identity!
Then, before that can happen...!!
"Raaaaaaaaahhh!!!"
...A moment of hesitation resulted in a delayed reaction.
The girl's delicate body slammed into her with unimaginable violent force, and since Tomoe wasn't expecting the hit she couldn't defend herself, so she collapsed to the ground.
The shock of her back striking the ground made her stop breathing, and that moment... Tomoe looked up at Natsumi's terrible visage and began to tremble.
(She's going to kill me...?!)
The assailant had moved beyond hostility and toward intent to kill.
There is a unique expression that one makes when attempting to take the life of another, with a jet-black darkness lurking in the back of their eyes... and it was on full display in Natsumi's face.
And, without any hesitation, she once again tightened both her hands around Tomoe's neck.
Yes, Natsumi...! Kill this detective!!
As long as this detective is around, you'll never be happy. She'll expose all your secrets and the heinous things you've done, then throw you in prison!!
So, kill her before that can happen!!
There's no other way! You can't go back and start over!!
You ha ve to de stroy eve rything...!!
...She couldn't breathe. Her consciousness was fading.
If things stayed like this... she had to do something, or she'd die...!
But it seemed that words would no longer get through to her...!
(I have no choice...!@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1578. I'm sorry, Natsumi-san...)
Tomoe raised the extendable baton in her right hand while quietly apologizing.
...But that moment.
Ever so faintly.
From the gap between Natsumi's clenched fang-like teeth... Tomoe could hear something resembling a voice.
"Help me"...?
What did that mean?
Tomoe was about to be killed, so shouldn't she be the one asking for help?
So what did she mean by asking for help...?
Still confused by her meaning, Tomoe neglected to pull Natsumi's hands away from her neck as she desperately tried to reason out her intentions.
And then.
"Help... me...@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1565. ...is..."
"Umm... Tomoe-san."
"Hmm...? What is it?"

"I'm... an only child.@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1568. I've always thought it would be nice to have an older sister like you, Tomoe.@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1569. Someone kind, and dependable, who I could talk to about anything..."
"So... umm, Tomoe-san... if you're fine with it.@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1571. From now on... I was thinking it would be nice to start calling you Sis. ...Would that be all right?"
"I... I'm sorry for suddenly saying something so weird.@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1573. But, I..."
"He lp me, S is..."
Her voice squeezed out like she was vomiting blood, and at the same time... huge teardrops came falling from Natsumi's eyes.
There was blood mixed in, making both of her eyes look bright red... and forming a number of red lines down her pale cheeks.
...Right.
She's such a kind, obedient, good girl.
She told me I was like a sister to her... a pitiful girl who wanted to be loved.
In that case... what would happen if I didn't believe in her?
If I don't keep protecting her... If I don't keep watching over her until the very end... then who else can save her...?!
"...It's all right, Natsumi-san."
"I'll believe...!@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1587. I believe in you...!!"
As she said that, Tomoe released her grip on Natsumi's hands and gently touched the girl's cheeks.
No longer putting up resistance, the pressure on her neck immediately increased and her consciousness was rapidly fading... Her field of view was getting darker and darker.
Nevertheless... Tomoe wouldn't break her smile.
Accepting the wounds in the girl's heart... she turned her weak breath into words and spoke with a smile on her face.
"You are such a kindhearted girl...@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1589. No matter what anyone in the world says... I'll always be on your side.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1590. Didn't I promise you that?"
"You're always doing your best... You're worried about so many things, but you always work so hard. I know that...!@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1592. So, hurry up... and come back already!"

"The... Natsumi I know... isn't such a weak girl...!@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1594. Yes... my little sister would never do something like this...!@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1595. So hurry up... Come back already...@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1596. Okay, Natsumi...?!"
"Ah, aah, aaaaaaaaaahhhh!!!"
...That moment.
A vague memory emerged in the back of my mind... and I saw a scene play out.
It was in a park just like this... Even the benches and the trees looked identical.
And... standing in front of me was a lone woman.
She dressed in a suit and had short hair... with a brilliant glow in the back of her eyes. It was her...
"Are you truly okay with this?@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1598. Disbelieving everything, doubting everyone... Are you sure you're all right with that?"
"...Whether I'm all right with it or not doesn't mean a thing.@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1580. This is the correct way, the only way.@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1581. Isn't it?"
"...Really?@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1600. That's not how I see it."

"Because you don't really think so, do you?@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1602. You're simply trying hard to convince yourself of that.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1603. You're the one who concocted this notion that the world is full of wicked people!"
"...That's quite the assumption.@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1583. How could you possibly understand me...?"
"I do understand!@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1605. I told you earlier, it's because you and I are the same!!"
Her words were intense and strict... Her voice was hot and full of passion... and the look on her face made my frozen heart audibly crack.
...Why?
Why is this woman so desperately fighting for my sake?
...We're not blood relatives. We're not even close... We're total strangers.
And on top of that... right now she should be my enemy. She should be the person least willing to forgive me.
And yet... why?
I don't understand... I can't begin to understand why she's doing this...!
But...

"Just like you, I lost myself to despair and refused to believe in anything.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1607. I struggled alone, I suffered, and I questioned why things only happened to me. I hated everything in the world...!"

"But... but you know!@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1609. Not being able to believe in anything... is really painful.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1610. The more I doubted the people around me, the more they stopped believing in me, and it kept driving them away.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1611. ...Everyone!"
"That's why I felt alone. Lonely, scared, and sad...!@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1613. You think you can endure that, Natsumi-san?@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1614. I couldn't endure it, myself!"

"Still... even so!@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1616. Even though there were people out there who would betray me, there were also definitely people out there who cared about me more than that!@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1617. And I couldn't give up until the end!"
"Even now, I still have occasional fears that my closest friends might one day betray me!@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1619. But there's more to the world than coldness!"
"Besides, there might be malice and self-interest lurking behind the kindness of others...@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1621. but the warmth of that kindness is definitely real!"
"...Such pretty words.@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1588. You make me sick."
"So what if they're pretty words?!@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1623. We don't want to look back on our memories on the day we die and feel the need to paint over them in black!"
Yes... just like back then.
Back then, this woman... reprimanded me and encouraged me, oh so many times.
She tried to drag me out of the darkness with her heartfelt kindness, telling me not to give up, not to despair.
That's why, back when Chisato-chan tried to persuade me, I was able to stop myself.
Even though I felt helpless and I was lost in despair that ruined everything, I was able to find a little light...
No, that's not all. It wasn't just that.
I murdered my whole family and nearly killed Chisato-chan... after that nightmarish tragedy.
After being arrested, I spent days, weeks, months locked in a small room at a detention facility to repay my sins... I was like a doll, not even aware if I was dead or alive.
My tears had completely withered away after the first few days... I had nothing left in me.
When I opened my eyes... I could see the dirty white walls, and a small view of the sky obstructed by a grid of bars.
I dejectedly leaned my back against the wall.
Just staring at the clouds as they flew past with a vacant look in my eyes... and asking God over and over again if this world was just a dream.
My body seemed crushed by the weight of my regrets.
I was nearly suffocating from the magnitude of my grief.
For me,
For me, life was no longer worth living.
It would be better for everyone if I died already.
I thought nothing but that... I was later taken to court, surrounded by esteemed people, and spent the whole time reflecting on the weight of my sins.
The prosecutor and defense attorney were having a complicated discussion.
Akira-kun, Chisato-chan, and Tamako-chan were crying and shouting, desperately trying to stick up for me.
"...We're going to help you, I promise!@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1346. Because we know better than anyone that you're not a bad girl!@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1347. So, don't ever, ever give up, Natsumi!"
"...Yeah...@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1590. Thanks..."
...However.
While I deeply appreciated Chisato-chan's encouragement... that doesn't change the fact that I'm a murderer. There's no mistaking that.
I was glad to receive everyone's kindness. ...Really, I was delighted.
But... I didn't have anything left to repay them with other than my life... I gave up everything and had no hope for anything.
I've ruined the future of so many people, so I have no right, no qualifications to seek a future of my own.
So at the very least, I don't want to cause anyone any further pain... so just let me die.
Erase me from this world... and if possible, erase me from everyone's memories, too, without leaving any trace.
That alone... was my one request to God, the one thing I was thinking about...
However.
When a familiar looking detective submitted the analysis results from the medicine I was taking as evidence during the trial, the situation started to change...

"...The drug the defendant was taking had tremendous detrimental effects on her mental and personal development.@k@vS14/31/VT4Bb_fujita1051. And so, by continuing to take this drug without being informed of its effects, the defendant... no, this girl, is also one of the victims here."
...They conducted various forms of scientific analysis, and the content of their findings was deemed very credible.
Based on that, Chisato-chan asked her father to help, so he submitted the testimony of many authoritative doctors.
And as a result, I...
"The defendant, Natsumi Kimiyoshi...@k@vS14/00/VT4Bb_saibanA1002. is found not guilty."
After hearing that declaration from the presiding judge... I fell silent, like I was lost in another world, and froze.
After that, I heard cheering from the public gallery, and everyone was offering me their support.
It was unbelievable... like a dream come true.
But... aside from all these other people being happy for me, I had nothing to be happy about.
...I was unfit to be forgiven.
It doesn't matter what caused it. ...Because I'm a murderer, there's no mistaking that.
With that thought, I blamed, tormented, and mangled my heart...
Even so, I went to greet and thank the detective who stood on the defense on my behalf, and then...
I heard something unbelievable.
The documents that detective presented... were arranged on orders from Minai-san...
"Even until the very end... Minai-san was worried about you.@k@vS14/31/VT4Bb_fujita1053. I'm sure if she were still alive, she'd be really glad to know you were found not guilty."
...It was then that I learned Minai-san was killed by a burglar while on active duty.
And... and... it happened when she was on the way to hear the analysis results... of my medication...!

"...I want to help that girl.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1625. I see something of my past in her...@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1626. If circumstances were a little different, I also might've turned out that way. So..."
She told the other detectives about all the things she was doing for me... and this detective relayed that to me.
She doing so much for me...
Desperately working for my sake...
And... and true to her word, she was willing to give her life, for me... For me!!
"...Minai...san...!"

"She was trying to protect your life until the very end.@k@vS14/31/VT4Bb_fujita1055. So please, cherish it.@k@vS14/31/VT4Bb_fujita1056. ...I think that would be the best way to honor her sacrifice.@k@vS14/31/VT4Bb_fujita1057. Please..."
"...Aaaaaaaaahhh, uwaaaaaaaaaaahh!!!"
Minai-san, who taught me something precious...
Minai-san, who rescued me from despair...
I could never again hear her harsh but kind voice.
Her strong, serious look would never again reach me.
She... was already gone.
And I'll never be able to thank her... never be able to tell her I'm sorry... Never...!!
"Uuu... uwaa...!@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1599. ...Uwaaaahh!!"
Even though I thought my tears had dried up... and that there was no sadness left in me.
I broke down sobbing on the spot... I couldn't stop the overflowing tears, and continued weeping for a while.
...That's right.
Back then... I swore an oath.
Maybe this is all a story from a dream. These may be unrelated events that happened in a completely different world.
But... there, someone fought to save my life... So I'll definitely cherish that effort, even in this world.
And I'll care just as much about the lives of others. No, maybe even moreso.
Yes, I've decided! I've learned from the people I love... I have!!
...Don't kill.
...Don't let yourself kill.
...Don't die.
...Don't let yourself die.
I'll go on living, for the sake of the people dear to me.
And so, I'll never hurt anyone and never again lose someone dear to me...!
So!!

"Disappear!@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1602. Disappear disappear disappear disappeeeeeear!!@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1603. Get out of my mind!!@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1604. Get out of my sight! Get out of my thoooughts!!!"
...I cried that out, desperately gathering the disappearing fragments of myself, while turning toward the black shadow that was trying to destroy me just a moment ago... and voicing my wish.
I... will not disappear!
I can't disappear!!
And... I refuse to hand this mind and body over to anyooooone!!!
Ngh... I-it can't be?!
This is nonsense... You can't keep carrying on with this nonsense, gh-gyaaaahhh!!
"I won't give it to you...!@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1606. I won't give you... Natsumi Kimiyoshi!!"
"I... am myself!!"
"Hurting Sis... refusing to accept anything, feeling nothing but hate and resentment, wishing misfortune on others!@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1609. That's not me! ...You are absolutely not me!!!"
Wh-whyyy!?!
Why am I... losing... to the likes of youuuuu!! G-geh, gugegege... gugyagoborogahigagugagaaaaaaaaa!!!
"Uu... uwaaaaaaaahhh!!@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1611. Aaaaaaaahhh!!!"
"...Aaaaaaaahhh!!!"
...Suddenly.
Natsumi released her hands from Tomoe's throat, then recoiled back and vigorously rose up, arching her back backwards while letting out a blood-curdling roar.
And then...
"...!@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1628. N-Natsumi-san?!"
She collapsed on the spot like a puppet with its strings cut, and Tomoe barely stirred her body enough to catch her.
Sweat was gushing from her body and her clothes were drenched. A feeble breath was barely emanating from her little mouth.
"Natsumi-san!@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1630. Stay with me, Natsumi-san!@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1631. ...Natsumiii!!"
"...Seriously, I'm glad you're safe."
Fujita let out a sigh of relief as he said that. Just how many times had he sighed today? He knew he was being insistent, but he couldn't help but say it.
"Are you all right, Minai-san?"
"Yeah... for the time being, the bleeding has stopped.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1633. Although, it probably would've been pretty dangerous if my carotid artery had been damaged."
"...This is no laughing matter."
He dejectedly spit the words out. ...Really Fujita and Hanada seemed to be feeling just as frightened as their words sounded.

It was fortunate that they were able to arrive at the park after receiving an emergency call from a payphone telling them to come alone... But when they arrived, they found Tomoe covered in blood, and an unconscious girl in her arms.
At first, they thought the two of them were both dead... but a few seconds later, Tomoe raised her head and began shouting and making a fuss.
"What on earth was that about?@k@vS14/31/VT4Bb_fujita1060. What happened back there?"
"I'd like to ask that, myself.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1635. I have absolutely no idea... I can't make any sense of it."
Tomoe shook her head while placing a hand on her throat. ...Her neck and both of her hands were painfully wrapped in bandages.
When she stopped by at a park, she suddenly noticed a girl she knew was collapsed on the ground and in pain, so she rushed over to her only to be immediately attacked.
That was the simplest way of explaining it... but it sounded like something out of a bad horror movie.
And what's more, it happened in the middle of the day so it was hard to write it off as the work of ghosts or monsters. It was just a peculiar reality.
(Ghosts... huh?)
As far as police investigations were concerned, there were no paranormal factors or occult explanations for incidents. ...At least, Tomoe thought so.
But, that's exactly why no matter how bizarre and incomprehensible the content of an incident may be, it needs proper analysis to elucidate the truth.
...It felt like she was giving herself a headache as she thought that.
"Well, the fact that this didn't draw anyone's attention is really a small blessing in disguise.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1638. If anyone had witnessed the incident, it would've caused a huge uproar."
"About that... Minai-san,@k@vS14/31/VT4Bb_fujita1062. do you really have no intention of pressing charges?"
"Well, of course?@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1640. Doing that would destroy the girl's future. I'm certain of it."

"Right... but it's true that the girl attacked you, isn't it?@k@vS14/31/VT4Bb_fujita1064. In addition to obstruction of government duties, she'd be charged with assault, and maybe even attempted murder. Even if tried in family court, a prison sentence wouldn't be out of question."
"...Right."
Tomoe had a bitter smile on her face... as she gazed at the face of Natsumi, laying on the bed in front of her.
The sedative she was hit with shortly after the detectives arrived on scene was very effective, and she was now deeply sleeping.
Looking at her gentle sleeping face, it made her previous violent outburst seem like a total fabrication.

"Even if she's an acquaintance, I don't think it's a good idea to let our emotions dictate how we handle crimes.@k@vS14/32/VT4Bb_hanada1037. And what's more, you were even injured.@k@vS14/32/VT4Bb_hanada1038. Minai-san, it's not like you to disregard regulations like this."

"Yes, if this girl committed this crime of her own volition, I wouldn't forgive it.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1643. ...But I can't deny the possibility that's not the case.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1644. Maybe this wasn't done by her will. Perhaps..."
"Perhaps what?"
"It was "the will of Oyashiro-sama."@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1646. This girl is a Hinamizawa native, so that sounds credible, doesn't it?"
"Huh?@k@vS14/32/VT4Bb_hanada1041. Please be serious.@k@vS14/32/VT4Bb_hanada1042. Are you suggesting that some supernatural being took over this girl's body?"

"Well, I don't believe that either.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1648. ...But I'm certain this behavior is outside the norm for her.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1649. It's almost like... the sort of derangement you often see in drug addicts. Does that make it make more sense?"
"...Then, no way?!"
"That's just baseless conjecture... at least for now.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1651. Still..."
Among those highly dependent on drugs, strong withdrawal symptoms can often include sudden deranged behavior and an inclination toward destruction.
Thoughts and actions that would not be normally possible are triggered regardless of the subject's will.

"For the time being, Hanada-kun, have her blood drawn and analyze it for the presence of the components in the drug she was carrying.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1653. Matsuoka-kun at Gifu prefectural police is the most reliable contact for this sort of analysis, so can you ask for his cooperation?"
"Understood."

"And Fujita-kun... give this girl's home a call.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1655. If you ask the hospital, they'll probably give you the number.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1656. But, as far as what you should tell them..."
"Right, understood.@k@vS14/31/VT4Bb_fujita1067. I'll downplay this incident with you and let them know.@k@vS14/31/VT4Bb_fujita1068. But..."
"But... what?"
"Oh, it's no big deal.@k@vS14/31/VT4Bb_fujita1070. Anyway, see you later."
After saying that, Fujita and Hanada gave a bow and then left the room. ...The only ones left in the room were Tomoe and Natsumi, who was still sleeping.
Suddenly feeling the wind getting stronger as dusk was drawing near, Tomoe went over and closed the window.
...Since this room was on the 8th floor, the window had bars behind it to prevent anyone falling out. But just in case, Tomoe fully tightened the lock to keep it from moving.
(If only that hospital room back then had bars on the window...)
If the nurse Youko Hiranuma couldn't think of a good way to kill Kouhei Sawamura... then that incident may have been avoided altogether.
And if that had been the case, then the subsequent traffic accident involving Nagisa Ozaki and the mysterious death of Hiranuma wouldn't have occurred either.
"...There's no point in thinking things like that."
Police and doctors wouldn't even be necessary if everyone could just start over with what-ifs.
Helping to relieve the stress and the pain after an unfortunate incident occurs. ...That was Tomoe's role as a police officer.
Just then, Tomoe heard Natsumi's voice, so she turned around thinking she might be waking up. The girl was absentmindedly looking left and right on her pillow, with a confused look on her face.
"Where am I...?"
"The hospital.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1662. The Saeki General Hospital, where you work part-time."
Natsumi suddenly caught her breath and started to sit up, but Tomoe smiled and held up a hand to keep her under control. Then she walked up next to her and sat in the folding chair beside the bed.
"How are you feeling?"
"Uh, umm... not especially bad."
"Don't overdo it, okay?@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1665. Please take it easy here for today.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1666. We've already contacted your parents."
"Sorry, I already heard a bit of the story.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1668. ...Seems like you've been going through a tough time."
"...Your mother was worried.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1670. She said she wants to apologize to you tomorrow."
"...@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1622.Is that so...?"

Natsumi had an ambiguous look on her face as she responded, then let out a sigh and looked up at the ceiling. ...She probably couldn't believe that her mother would so easily admit she'd been in the wrong.
...As a matter of fact, Tomoe did leave out a lot of the details.
Right after bringing Natsumi to Saeki hospital, Tomoe immediately contacted her home and spoke with her mother.
She no longer made any attempt at concealing her identity. And as expected, Tomoe heard a gasp from the other end of the phone... but the next thing Natsumi's mother said was very unpleasant.
"So, what did Natsumi do...?"

"...Nothing in particular.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1672. For the time being, her injuries are nothing serious. According to the doctor's diagnosis, she can leave the hospital as long as she gets a few days of rest."
Then Tomoe gave a terse response of "If you want the full story, come here" and hung up the phone. ...An unpleasant ringing sound echoed out as she slammed the receiver down.
(Wouldn't a normal parent immediately ask if their child is safe...?)
Thinking that was a sign of human nature, Tomoe disconsolately shook her head. But... on the other hand, that initial reaction did clearly demonstrate one thing.
And, just an hour later... her mother came here in a hurry.
Tomoe invited her to a vacant hospital room, then asked about what happened before Natsumi left home, hiding the details of her assault...
"...So, at dinner last night, Natsumi-san asked about going on a trip with a male friend, and it turned into an argument after you voiced opposition.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1675. Is that all?"
"Y-yes...@k@vS14/00/VT4Bb_natsuM1041. There's... not much else."

"Please rest assured, Kimiyoshi-san,@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1677. I already know a little about Hinamizawa.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1678. So, I understand your particular circumstances, and I promise not to tell anyone about the incident today."
"So, can you talk to me?"
Despite Tomoe prefacing the conversation that way, Natsumi's mother's gave self-defensive and biased explanations in order to avoid responsibility. It was hard to take any of it as objective.
But even so, Tomoe patiently listened through it in order to uncover the truth, frequently asking questions to direct the flow of the conversation...
Finally, she was able to infer the source of Natsumi's abnormal behavior.

"...I see. I understand the situation now.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1681. So, when you tried to talk to her the following morning, she suddenly ran out of the house and fled.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1682. That's how it played out?"

"...I was certain she just didn't want to be around us, so I assumed she was running off to school.@k@vS14/00/VT4Bb_natsuM1045. I must admit, I haven't been able to keep up with some aspects of her behavior lately..."
"Lately?@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1684. ...Is this really something that only happened "lately?"@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1685. Has she ever exhibited any unusual behavior in the past?"

"The first thing you said over the phone,@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1687. "What did Natsumi do?"@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1688. Normally in cases like this, you'd think your child was caught up in some incident, or had an accident. But for some reason, your question made it seem like she was the perpetrator."
"...That means you were aware of the danger of letting your daughter run around acting in desperation, doesn't it?"

"Don't underestimate the Japanese police force.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1691. If we inquire into her behavioral patterns, we'll be able to quickly tell the difference between a sudden change and something chronic."
"...Why don't I take a few statements from other people, then come back and ask you the same question again?"
"W-well...!"
Based on how visibly upset Natsumi's mother was reacting, Tomoe could tell her intuition was on point.
Then, after some in-depth discussion about Natsumi's past and home life... Tomoe struggled to contain her anger over how often this woman got in the girl's way.
(Honestly... she was so patient to put up with this.)
Even thinking back on it now made her sickeningly angry. If she wasn't speaking with a woman, she seriously might have slugged her...

"At any rate, I think your situation is better than it was before.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1695. So please, try talking to her again.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1696. I'll be all right. You'll be able to get through to her this time, okay?@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1697. And if that still doesn't work, feel free to come talk to me again... alright?"
"Y-yeah.@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1624. ...Ah?!"
That moment, Natsumi noticed the bandages wrapped around Tomoe's neck and the back of her hands, and she remembered the "incident" that caused it in the park.
At the time... she was desperately clawing at her throat, but Tomoe jumped into harm's way in order to protect her... and then...!
"T-Tomoe-san...!@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1626. O-oh my goodness, I...!!"

"Oh, this?@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1699. ...Actually, I have a condition where I develop rashes on my skin when I'm overly fatigued.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1700. Thanks to that, I scratched myself in the middle of the night, and before I knew it I was covered in scratches..."
"Th-that's a lie!@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1628. I-I'm the one who did it..."
"No, you didn't."
"You didn't do anything.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1703. I can attest to that.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1704. And since the person in question is the one telling you this, what more proof do you need?"
With the smile disappearing from her face and donning a serious expression, Tomoe looked directly at Natsumi and repeated it again more clearly.
"T-Tomoe...san."
"It's normal for anyone to act violently when they're having a nightmare.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1706. I could never say I get the best sleep, myself."

"...You passed out in the park, and went on a bit of a rampage while having a nightmare.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1708. But nobody was hurt, including me, and you were able to awaken from that dream.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1709. ...That's all. It's over."

"It's an older sister's job to protect her little sister.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1711. ...Right?@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1712. So, after you're discharged from the hospital, what do you say to grabbing some cake at Angel Mort again?"
Tomoe had a bright smile on her face as she said that, while slowly running Natsumi's bangs through her fingers.
...It was a nice, gentle warmth.
But with the smell of disinfectant solution emanating from those bandaged hands, she couldn't suppress the feeling of heartbreak inside her.
"Uuu... uuuuuuu...!!@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1633. Tomoe-san, I... I...!!"
Natsumi leapt into Tomoe's arms, sobbing and wailing as she did.
...She was delighted.
She ashamed, frightened, horrified, grief-stricken, and frustrated.
But she was sorry, thankful, and happy to be accepted the way she was...
Natsumi just clung to Tomoe for a while, sobbing, her thoughts and feelings overflowing...
"Have you calmed down...?"
Natsumi firmly nodded, while wiping her bright red eyes with Tomoe's handkerchief.
Her voice was faint since she'd been crying for so long, but it finally felt like the tension had been released, so Tomoe felt relieved.
"Umm... Tomoe-san."
"What is it?"
"There's something I'd like to talk to you about.@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1637. You might hate me by the end of it... but will you listen the whole way through?"
"Yes, of course.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1716. ...But you'll have to accept the condition that I won't necessarily hate you in the end."
"...@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1639.Thanks."
And then, Natsumi began her story.
It was largely the same as what she heard from Natsumi's mother... but of course the urgency and seriousness had a remarkably different tone.
...Natsumi was originally far more introverted.

She preferred reading books at home over playing with friends. ...It seems that started because her parents got upset with her when she had fun with others. "You got your clothes dirty." "You're making trouble for others."
After that, she began keeping her distance from her friends, and they started teasing and badmouthing her... so she became more and more isolated.
And, Natsumi's environment was getting more and more terrible around the time she moved on to middle school...

"I told you before, about the nickname I had in elementary school... "Zashiki-warashi." Even in middle school, it was the first thing someone called me.@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1641. And it became the name everyone in the class called me."

"If that was all it was, I could've just ignored it...@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1643. but we happened to be reading our Japanese textbooks one day, and there was a story saying that a ghost's hair brings good luck..."
..."Zashiki-warashi's" hair brings good luck.
It was completely baseless and absurd, but the story got the class excited, so one of her classmates came over half-teasing to cut Natsumi's hair.

Even as a joke, for someone like her who took great pride in her hair, it was absolutely terrible. So she couldn't stand it, and shouted "Stop!" while violently smacking away the hand of the kid holding the scissors.
She used too much force, so the scissors were thrown from the kid's hand and ended up cutting into the arm of another nearby student, which caused an uproar in the classroom.
The girl's face distorted in pain and terror as soon as she saw the blood on her arm.. and the female students watching began shivering.
The male students surrounding the area were absolutely stunned to see that level of bloodshed for the first time.
And Natsumi stood there shocked in the center of it all, with her mind completely blank...

"I was called into the teachers office for violently cutting some kid's arm with scissors.@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1645. They called my parents to tell them, too.@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1646. No matter how many times I tried to tell them it was the other kid's fault and not mine, they didn't believe me."

"I was scolded and reprimanded for being a bad, violent person.@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1648. After that, the kid did come to apologize to me, but didn't understand that their everyday actions were just as bad..."
As a result, Natsumi refused to go to school... and holed up inside her room.
How would her classmates look at her if she went to school?
She confident the boys would badmouth her again, and the girls would keep their distance to avoid getting involved.
The teacher probably wouldn't be able to set aside earlier doubts, and might regard her as a problem child.
...She was scared just imagining it.
School was no longer a fun place for Natsumi...
Her parents were initially in a hurry to get her back into school, so they half violently forced her to go.

But... every time, she'd collapse in the middle of class with a migraine and throw up, causing a huge commotion... More and more, her classmates and teachers would stare at her and regard her as a "problem child."
Eventually, just mentioning the word "school" was enough to make her feel dizzy and faint... so the school advised her to seek counseling.

"...The doctor told me I had anemia.@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1650. So after going through several rounds of medical exams, they brought me to a big hospital... where I was advised to take medication for my illness."
"A big hospital...? The one in Gogura?"
"Yes.@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1652. ...And the medicine worked very well.@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1653. Even though I would feel sick just thinking about school, I felt all better after taking it."

"And even when I was having a bad day and my body felt listless, I'd be able to feel better right away...@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1655. They also told me it would be okay to take more than the recommended dose, so I started relying on it..."
"After that... well, you already know the rest, Tomoe-san.@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1657. When I took too much of the medication, somehow, I found another version of myself talking to me..."
Natsumi didn't care much at first, because it only crawled out of her consciousness when she was sleeping and having a nightmare.
But slowly, over time, she was able to hear the voice even when she was still awake...
And the result was what happened today.
"...That girl... had taken over my body."
"...Natsumi-san."
"...You might not believe me.@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1660. Because it sounds like I'm running away, blaming everything on some demon and saying I didn't do anything wrong."
"This isn't a movie, or a novel, yet I'm saying something so stupid, aren't I...?"

"But... even so, that girl is my true heart revealing itself.@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1663. Wanting to destroy everyone.@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1664. Wanting everyone to be gone.@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1665. Erasing everything I don't like, killing everyone that gets in my way, and...?!"
"...It's okay."
She wrapped her hands around Natsumi's trembling hands, transmitting the warmth of her palms... to which Natsumi replied by continuing to timidly look away.
Tomoe... had a gentle smile on her face.
And then she gave another firm nod to Natsumi, who was biting her lip in hesitation.

"...It must've been really tough, huh?@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1723. Then it's fine now. Everyone has times when they want to be angry, or give in to despair.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1724. ...But that's not something to be ashamed of.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1725. If you're ever feeling that way, I'm always willing to listen to you."
"...I'll say it as many times as it takes.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1727. I love you.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1728. I think of you as a real sister, with all the good and bad that comes with it."

"So, you don't need to put on airs in front of me.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1730. You don't have to be a good girl.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1731. In fact, you could stand to be a little more selfish, to be more of a bad girl... and even make trouble for me.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1732. Okay?"
"Uuu... uwaah...!@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1668. ...Uwaaaahh!!"
"Welcome back... Natsumi."
"...I'm back...!@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1670. I'm back... Sis...!!"
Natsumi tightly squeezed Tomoe's hands and sobbed.
...It's okay for me to be here.
It's all right... to go on living... right, Sis?
As if to answer that question... Tomoe gently stroked Natsumi's head.
For that... she was glad.
Even if everything she had were to disappear, she was sure that...
"...Natsumi!"
...Then, all of a sudden.
The door of the hospital room violently swung open. And then, a girl charged in with her face pale and the braids in her hair coming unraveled.
"Ch...Chisato-chan...?!"
She must've run the whole way down the hallway, because huge beads of sweat were running along her forehead and harsh breaths were constantly spilling from her mouth.
Chisato... was that the girl Natsumi described as her best friend?
Remembering the name, Tomoe began to speak up, offering the girl her seat to let her catch her breath...
For a moment, Natsumi and Tomoe were frozen in place, with their eyes open wide in shock.
Chisato steadied her breathing, then ran straight toward Natsumi with an angry look on her face... and slapped her cheek, hard.
Then,
"...You idiot...!@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1351. You total moroooon!!"

Shouting loud enough you could easily forget this was inside a hospital, she forcefully dove into Natsumi's chest, pressing her face right up against it, her shoulders shaking and her voice cutting out.
...Natsumi's hospital gown quickly became soaked in dribbling teardrops, and her tightly clenched chest was being wrinkled.
Natsumi ignored the pain in her cheek and gazed at her sobbing best friend.
She hardly felt any pain from the slap. Instead, the shock made her mind go completely blank, and she couldn't think of anything to say.
Then.
Chisato suddenly raised her head to look up at Natsumi. Though Tomoe was standing right beside her, Chisato saw nothing but her best friend.
"Why...? Why didn't you talk to us?!@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1354. Even though things went this far... even though your heart was running wild, why didn't you talk to us!?!"
"Chisato...chan..."

"I'm your best friend, aren't I?!@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1356. You, me, and Tamako! The three of us!@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1357. We made a promise, that we'd always get along and try to understand the thoughts inside each other's hearts, didn't we?!"
"But you were this unwilling to trust me!?!"
Despite still crying and her face being wet with tears, Chisato's sharp gaze was enough to make Natsumi awkwardly turn away.
As soon as Tomoe noticed, she tried to pull the two of them apart, but Chisato pushed her away and then spoke vehemently.
"Do you... do you have any idea?!@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1360. Do you have any idea just how worried I was about you?!"

"After you left school, I talked to all sorts of people, and we split up trying to find you!@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1362. I was worried you might do something desperate, and I was thinking about it the whole time, right until this very moment!!"

"I even prayed to God!!@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1364. I've been wishing for your safety, from the bottom of my heart!!@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1365. And then... and then the police came to help you... and brought you to this hospital...!!"
"Don't apologize!!@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1367. I don't want to hear an apology!!@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1368. I... I just wanted to be sure you're safe, so... so then...!!"
...After that, there were no longer any words.
Just... Chisato feeling relieved, and glad to learn that Natsumi was safe.
The fact that she yelled at her and suddenly slapped her must've been the flip side of how desperate she'd been.
That's how it felt... so Natsumi couldn't feel resentful over being slapped.
She felt sincerely sorry for making her worry.
And more than that, she felt thankful.

"You moron... I wish you had said something...!@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1370. Didn't you promise that if something was bothering you, you'd tell me no matter what...?!@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1371. And yet you kept quiet until all this happened... You total idiot...!!"
"Chisato-chan..."
"...Chisato-chan, please try to understand Natsumi's circumstances.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1736. She..."
"...I know all that!!@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1373. I know about Natsumi's illness!!"
Natsumi suddenly gasped and her face hardened as she turned toward Chisato. She was still crying, and there was sobbing in her voice as she spoke, but she placed her hand on top of Natsumi's.
"You... you've been coming to this hospital... Saeki hospital, together with your grandmother! And I've known it for a long time!"
"You said you were just accompanying her, but... I saw it!@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1376. I saw you undergoing a psychiatric exam! But I didn't mean to see it, it was a complete accident...!!"
...Really, it was just a coincidence.
I just happened to head up to the hospital rooftop to kill some time until my father finished a meeting, and on the way back...
As I stepped down the rooftop staircase and out onto the floor, I noticed the back of a familiar hairstyle down the end of the hallway, so I followed her.
And of course, I knew it was Natsumi, so I was about to call out to her as bright as always... but when I suddenly saw the sign posted on the wall, I choked down my words and kept quiet.
Because the department listed on the label there said "Psychiatry."
It was then that I remembered the top floor of the hospital was the psychiatric ward...
(Why... is Natsumi in the psychiatric ward?)
I shook the suspicions out of my head... but honestly, at the same time I was half worried and half curious.
So after Natsumi finished her exam, I had the doctor on duty show me her medical chart on the pretense of asking if I could help in some way.

But... I came to horribly regret that decision as soon as I learned the contents. And I felt ashamed of my shallowness for making light of mental illness. I told myself over and over, I'm supposed to be the daughter of a hospital director.
Natsumi's medical condition was far more than mere stress and anxiety, it was a serious, weighty "mental disorder..."
"...What is the name of this illness?@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1381. I can't quite read it... Is this in German?"

"Right, to put it simply... it's like anxiety neurosis.@k@vS14/00/VT4Bb_menDoc1002. It's characterized by sudden anxiety when surrounded by a large number of people, along with palpitations, vertigo, shortness of breath, and excessive levels of fear."
The symptoms are often found in people who face unreasonable expectations, or are forced to work beyond their limits.
It's especially serious when the person in question has an earnest personality, because it makes treatment difficult.

"...However, the general public has very little awareness of mental illness.@k@vS14/00/VT4Bb_menDoc1004. Even though the subject may recognize their dispassionate speech and conduct, they might feel they're not good enough, or too weak to overcome their difficult situation... so they immediately turn their way of thinking around."
"As a result, the subject won't be able to speak out about it even when they feel symptomatic, so the medical condition will grow worse without proper consultation."
"...It seems this girl finally came to the hospital after the situation got especially bad.@k@vS14/00/VT4Bb_menDoc1007. It'll take a considerable amount of time for a complete recovery."
When I heard that... I finally understood why Natsumi continued acting like she felt threatened and seemed anxious about something all the time.
It wasn't just about her personality or the environment she grew up in. ...It's because she had deep psychological wounds in her heart.
And... the doctor said it was because she was subjected to bullying in her previous school.
"Natsumi..."
My chest tightened, and pain crept up my back.
Even though she was suffering from her painful past and this illness... she kept on acting bright and cheerful, without showing us any of it. Carrying that burden alone.
...Just like my sister Kaori.
She never showed any pain or any signs to make me worry. She just really loved me.
Even up until the moment her condition took her last breath, she truly believed in me.
And yet... I...
I couldn't do anything for my sister... In fact, I ended up betraying her trust...
Right then... I decided.
I'd become a true friend for Natsumi. No matter what happened, I'd be on her side.
And I swore to myself that this time I'd never abandon the people I love.
...Yes. I'm sure this is the redemption God sent me for the sin I committed so long ago.
I abandoned Kaori. I should've been able to save her, but I couldn't do anything for that girl.
But now, I can. I can support Natsumi until she's healthy again.
...I might be making some big assumptions here.
And really, I have to wonder if this is what Natsumi even wants.
But... even so, it's fine.
Rather than look back and regret what I wasn't able to do, I think it would be better to look back on the things I've done to bring her happiness.

"...So, I was rooting for things to go well between you and Akira, because I thought it would help you overcome your illness even just a little!@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1386. I was willing to do anything I thought might help you!"
"My feelings for Akira didn't really matter, as long as it meant you'd be able to smile!"
Even though she was already faintly aware of it... Natsumi was stunned to hear Chisato directly speak about her feelings for Akira, so she froze.
...She couldn't take the statement that it "didn't really matter" at face value. If their roles were reversed, she never would've been able to accept that, no matter what came in exchange.
It was so much determination and resolution... and her friend was doing this for her sake...!
"So... when I heard that Akira was going to Hinamizawa with you, I felt I had to stop it!"
"I knew you had no good memories of that place, and going there might just make your illness worse, so I couldn't bear to watch!@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1390. So, I...!"
"...There are some pretty weird rumors about Hinamizawa.@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1392. So I thought it would be better if you didn't go there."
"Weird rumors...? Like what?"
"There's a curse.@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1394. For some reason, there are victims on the day of Watanagashi every year... and I hear that people have actually died for the past few years."
I told Akira that... passing on the story I heard from Mamoru-senpai, even though I only half believed it.
But I figured that would be the best way to make Akira feel reluctant to go to Hinamizawa.
"But, Natsumi didn't say a word about that..."

"Of course she couldn't say it.@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1396. She was worried if she told you she was from a place like that, you might start to wonder if maybe she was one of them.@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1397. ...Try to understand what she was thinking."
Natsumi couldn't even admit that she was bullied in her former town... there was no way she'd be able to tell Akira she was suffering from mental illness.

This was Akira. Finding out about something like that would probably break his heart even more than Natsumi's and leave deep wounds. Plus, she didn't want her boyfriend to know about her ancient secrets.
But even so... No, precisely for that reason, I thought I had to stop the two of them from going to Hinamizawa.
What if Natsumi ran into some old friends there?
Or what if seeing the Hinamizawa scenery triggered some terrible old memories?

Natsumi would be experiencing the stress that gave her this illness all over again. And, she'd probably keep acting like it was all okay, all for Akira's sake... enduring an even heavier burden in the process.
So, in order to keep that from happening, I tried to stay calm like usual and act like I was just joking around... while desperately trying to make Akira consider going somewhere else instead.
But... thinking back on it now, there's no way Natsumi could overhear something like that and not walk away thinking I was trying to slander her.
That's why I was running all around the city until just a little while ago, cursing my rashness and negligence, wanting to at least apologize to Natsumi...
"No way...@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1680. You went that far, for me? ...Why?"

"Yeah... that's right!@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1399. I was being completely selfish and hypocritical!@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1400. I was acting out on my own, trying to force my kindness on others like I always do!"
"But... still, I wanted to be a friend you could rely on!!@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1402. You said you loved me, so I wanted to be able to show you I loved you too!!"
"But... even so, I couldn't put it into words!@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1404. Because even if I did, you'd just end up asking me why, just like you did right now."
"And then I'd have to tell you that I knew about your illness!@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1406. And then it wouldn't just be about your past, but my old mistakes too! Everything!"
"I... I couldn't do that, so...!!"
There was no way Natsumi would be pleased to learn Chisato already knew the secrets she was trying to keep hidden.
And just like Natsumi wanted to keep her past and her illness hidden... it was painful for Chisato to remember her little sister Kaori.
If she actually told Natsumi about it, Natsumi might despair, wondering if she was just a sort of replacement for Chisato's sister.
Or she might have scorned Chisato for acting so nice up until now when she'd done something so terrible.
And even when you know something, sometimes pretending you don't know can certainly make you happier.
So, she didn't want to ruin things.

No matter how guilty or ashamed she felt, Chisato wanted to protect the pleasant environment she and her precious friends shared, where they were able to peacefully chat and help each other... No matter what, she had to protect it.
"...Chisato-chan."
"Sorry... I'm sorry, Natsumi!@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1409. I'm the one who should be apologizing... Really!"

"I wanted to be your friend, and I didn't want to destroy our loving relationship...!@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1411. And yet, because of my stupidity, I ended up pushing you into a corner instead, and made you suffer...!!"
"...That's not true.@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1684. That's not true at all...!"
Natsumi gently placed her hands on Chisato's shoulders... and shook her head.
...Right. If she was in pain, she should have spoken up about it.
Even if she couldn't do that, she should have honestly expressed at least some of her doubts.
"Chisato-chan, why are you doing so much for me?@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1686. You like Akira-kun, don't you?"
...But she could never ask about it. She kept quiet and pretended not to know.
And her reason was the same as Chisato's. Natsumi was afraid of ruining her relationship with Chisato.

"Sorry... I'm sorry...@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1688. I was only ever thinking about myself... so I never noticed your wounds, Chisato-chan.@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1689. I thought you were so much better than me, that you could do anything, so you were different from me... but....."
...Chisato was exactly the same.
Suffering from the scars of her past, and trying to escape from them... even up until today.
If only she had properly accepted it...
"At this point... is there still time?@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1691. It's not too late, is it?@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1692. Chisato-chan..."

"Would you... be my friend?@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1694. Would you be willing to listen to me go on about all my problems?@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1695. And all of your troubles, too. Would you be willing to... share them with me...?"
"Natsumi... Natsumiii...!!"
The two of them shed tears while tightly embracing one another, as if to restore their earlier bond through a hug.
Upon seeing that, Tomoe quietly made her way out of the hospital room... and gently closed the door.
"Thank goodness... Natsumi-san."
...The two of them still had many difficulties and walls they needed to surmount.
Especially Natsumi's illness, which is nowhere near as easy to deal with as it sounds. It'll certainly take a long time for her to recover.
(...Even so.)
There was nothing to worry about. They didn't need anything at all.
Because they were friends who sincerely trusted each other, who could understand one another's past scars and provide whatever encouragement they needed.
